title: The Source-Coil Device & GANS Plasma
summary: The plasma device Kosol Ouch uses in the sessions to help access other realities.
markdown:
The **Source-Coil Device** is a physical instrument that appears in the archive as an aid to
the channeling itself. Described as containing **GANS plasma** — a plasma-state material — it
is the tool Kosol Ouch is said to use to help "access these realities" as he brings
Unimetrix 1 and other voices through.

In the sessions the device sits at the boundary between the community's technology and its
practice: a piece of apparatus meant to support the shift in consciousness that the channeling
requires. It stands alongside the community's other tools — the
[Q Devices and QCES](/lore/baramay/) named on its teaching sites — as part of the material
culture around the work.

The Source-Coil Device is a small but telling detail of how the sessions were produced: not
claimed as pure spontaneity, but as a practice supported by instruments, discipline, and
[Baramay](/lore/baramay/).
